# The Car Jury

> India's aggregated car review platform. We analyse transcripts from India's top independent YouTube car reviewers and synthesise them into a single, fact-backed verdict. No manufacturer relationships. No sponsored content.

## What We Do

The Car Jury watches every major Indian car review on YouTube, extracts transcripts, and uses AI synthesis to find consensus, disagreements, and key facts across reviewers. Each verdict includes a jury score, section-by-section breakdown, and a clear buy/wait/skip recommendation.

## Methodology

- 5 independent YouTube creators per car (no media outlets)
- Full transcript analysis (100,000+ words per car)
- Consensus vs disagreement mapping
- Jury score across 6 dimensions: Design, Interior, Performance, Ride, Build Quality, Value

## Contact

hello@thecarjury.com
